text: MSP outage alert: Microsoft 365 Admin Center access issues reported; admin operations may be delayed.

text.text:
*Current Issue*
Multiple reports indicate Microsoft 365 Admin Center access failures and severe slowness, with admins in North America reporting the portal as unavailable or largely unusable across multiple tenants.

fields.text:
*Status*
Active / investigation reported; scope appears concentrated around Admin Center access rather than a broad full-suite outage.

*Impact*
MSP help desk and cloud admin work may be delayed for user changes, tenant administration, licensing, and troubleshooting; end-user workloads appear less impacted than admin operations.

text.text:
*Response*
• Delay non-urgent Microsoft 365 administrative changes and queue tenant actions until portal stability improves.
• Use alternate operational paths where possible, document blocked work, and monitor Microsoft communications plus peer operator reports for recovery.
